alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs, including stakeholder management across multiple teams and organizations
alignments.job_requirement: Ability to influence decision-makers and C-level executives by developing relationships and orchestrating teams

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions at Google Devices and Services; likely mentored or led teams, though no explicit detail on technical coaching or architect development
alignments.job_requirement: Coach junior Solutions Architects and teams on use case prioritization and building technical champions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Commercial operations and transformation background suggests GTM and customer strategy exposure, but no specific evidence of pre-sales or solutions architecture strategy development
alignments.job_requirement: Develop customer engagement strategies in partnership with Account Executive(s)

gaps.gap: No demonstrated technical pre-sales or Solutions Architect background. Role requires hands-on proof-of-concept leadership, cloud platform expertise, and Spark/Python depth.
gaps.mitigation: Role includes willingness to learn Spark; Python is listed as basic/actively learning. However, pre-sales customer engagement and technical architecture validation cannot be quickly upskilled in a customer-facing capacity.

gaps.gap: Limited coding and hands-on data platform experience. JD requires prior coding in core languages (Python, Java, Scala) and hands-on expertise with complex PoCs and cloud platforms.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has no production software-engineering background. While Python learning is underway, reaching PoC-leadership competency alongside customer escalations is a multiyear gap.

gaps.gap: No consulting or solutions-architecture background evident. Role demands navigating complex customer technical landscapes, orchestrating cloud ecosystem partnerships, and architecting data analytics solutions.
gaps.mitigation: Limited direct consulting brand and classic case-team experience per candidate profile. Google DevOps/ops background differs substantially from external technical advisory and multi-stakeholder solution design.

gaps.gap: Product Operations and transformation experience does not transfer to technical pre-sales architecture. This is a field-facing, customer-engagement, hands-on technical role.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate strength is internal transformation and operations; this role requires external customer-facing technical leadership and PoC ownership in a competitive sales context.

hard_blockers.evidence: Prior experience with coding in a core programming language (i.e., Python, Java, Scala) and willingness to learn a base level of Spark. Hands-on expertise with complex proofs-of-concept and public cloud platform(s).

output.summary: This is a Senior Solutions Architect role requiring deep hands-on technical pre-sales expertise, Python/Spark/cloud platform fluency, and proof-of-concept leadership in a customer-facing context. The candidate brings eight years of Google commercial operations and transformation strength with strong stakeholder management, but lacks the technical pre-sales background, programming depth, and public cloud/data platform architecture experience essential for this role. The function is not a strategic operations, business transformation, or internal program leadership fit; it is a technically deep field-engineering customer engagement role.
uncertainties: Depth of cloud platform hands-on experience at Google Devices and Services not specified; may have indirect exposure but not the primary domain
Exact nature of customer interactions in commercial operations role; could range from internal-only to some field-facing exposure, but unclear if pre-sales or solutions architecture
Whether Google transformation programs included technical solution design or primarily process/organizational transformation
Visa or relocation status relative to Sydney, Australia location not provided
